Meaning.En: containing a high amount of fat, especially in a way that is considered excessive or unhealthy.
Meaning.Example: The burger was delicious but very fatty, leaving me feeling overly full.

Situation.Vi: Mô tả thực phẩm có hàm lượng chất béo cao, thường không lành mạnh.
Situation.En: Describing food with a high fat content, often considered unhealthy.

Situation.Vi: Chỉ tính chất vật lý của mô hoặc chất béo trong cơ thể.
Situation.En: Referring to the physical property of tissue or fat in the body.

Meaning.Vi: người béo phì (thường mang tính chê bai)
Meaning.En: an informal and often offensive term for a very overweight person.
Meaning.Example: He tried to ignore the teasing, but the nickname "Fatty" still stung.

Situation.Vi: Sử dụng trong văn nói không trang trọng, thường mang tính xúc phạm.
Situation.En: Used in informal speech, often as a derogatory or teasing term.
